Recipes Feed Wallet Search Messages Notifications
My Profile Feeds Recipes Sous Chef Cheffy OnlyFood Lists Drafts & Scheduled Settings Interface Relays Media Servers Keys Safety Proof of Work Social Graph Custom Emojis Relay Health Console Network Status Advanced
Search Wallet Relay Health Relay Detail Edit Profile Compose / New Post Reply Quote Keys Safety Relays Zaps Interface Chat List Community Nourish
Create Account Log In Continue with Google Continue with Nostr Nostr logo
/ Continue with Nostr Enter your existing key, or create a new account. Your key never leaves the device. Create new account Creating…
410412439051-mhcgeuvc2sjp75v8snucstfr5smrg03g.apps.googleusercontent.com Starting… Signing in with Google… Checking your Google Drive backup… Almost there… Your backed-up accounts Tap an account to restore it, or create a new one. New accounts are encrypted and added to your Google Drive backup. Create your account Zap Cooking will generate a new Nostr key and save an encrypted backup to a hidden folder in your Google Drive. Restore Create account & back up Create another account
Set a recovery PIN Pick a 4–8 digit PIN. You\'ll need it to restore your account on a new device. If you forget this PIN, your Nostr key is lost forever — there is no reset. Confirm your PIN Enter your PIN again to make sure you remember it. PINs didn\'t match. Try again. Enter your recovery PIN This is the PIN you set when you first signed in to Zap Cooking with this Google account. Incorrect PIN. Try again. PIN Use 4–8 digits Unlock %d people online now Online Now %d online in your network %d online across all of Nostr Zap Cooking logo
Sign Up Log In Or log in with your key nsec or npub… Zap Cooking Food. Friends. Freedom. Hide key Show key
Continue Let\'s go Save Profile Save draft New Post New Group DM Reply Quote What\'s on your mind? Add a description for your gallery post… Gallery Post Tap to add photos or videos Switch to Text Switch to Gallery Publish Publishing… Uploading… Mining in progress… Scheduling… Schedule Post Post now (%d) Replying to Marked as NSFW Post now Cancel Save Delete Create Add Remove Close OK Retry Go to Social Graph Go to Wallet Reveal Private Key Never share your private key with anyone! Connect Scan QR Skip Follow Unfollow Follow All Block Unblock Mute Thread Add to List Pin to Profile Unpin from Profile Share Copy Note ID Copy Note JSON Copy Text Hide Repost Vote Anonymous Private Custom Done Edit Add preset Paste Back Clear Load more Try anyway Reconnect Gallery Go Send Receive Next Logout Use as Feed Follow All Members Copy List JSON Delete List Copy Undo
What\'s on your mind? New set name Set name hashtag Add photo Display name About Name Profile Picture URL Banner URL NIP-05 (e.g. user@domain.com) Lightning Address wss:// Search users and notes Search relay wss://relay.example.com Message… Reply… relay.example.com Option %d + Add option NWC Connection String nostr+walletconnect://… Lightning address or invoice user@domain.com or lnbc… Amount (sats) Amount (%1$s) Message (optional) New list name Add a word or phrase Filter by name npub1… or hex Or add by npub / hex: To Network Total spent
read write auth
Status Failures Events Name All Bad Only Errors Connected Bad Recipes Packs Cookbook My Recipes Discover Mine Saved Tags Profiles Notes For You Follows Extended Trending Relay List Hashtags Feed Interests Loading interest sets… No interest sets yet. Create one below, or follow hashtags from their feed pages. No hashtags yet Delete Set Muted Words Muted Users Replies Media Following Relays Recent Earlier Pinned New Set All relays + New Set Favorites Relay Sets Combined Feed %d relays covers %d No relay scores available yet +Set Details Comment Zap Actions REACT Zap ACTIONS Open zap dialog Open reaction picker Send options Send options coming soon.
Back Intelligence tools Toggle theme Show QR code Lightning address Switch account Add account Active Seen on Sent with Filter notifications All Replies Zaps Reposts Mentions Reactions Votes DMs Zen Filtered Notification Filters Chat rooms Enable all Disable all Mute notifications Unmute notifications reposted Private zap Verified Retry verification More options Content warning Reply React Repost Zaps Reaction Mention Vote Send reply Send zap Add to List Profile picture Following Blocked DM relays Attach media Send Receive Banner Send message Private Play video Backspace Confirm QR Code Copy npub Copy hex pubkey New post Create recipe Delete Add hashtag Change timeframe Cancel mining Hashtag picker Add relay Add word Upload avatar Upload banner Remove relay Add new Create Emoji Set Upload image
Quick Reactions Unicode emojis shown in the reaction picker Custom Image Emojis Image emojis from your emoji list (kind 10030) Available Custom Emojis All custom emojis available in your reaction picker Manage Remove Save (%d removed) My Emoji Sets No emoji sets yet. Tap + to create one. Add Custom Emoji Shortcode %d emojis Emoji Library Add from Keyboard Type or paste an emoji Add Cancel Done (%d)
Media Servers Broadcast Server List Broadcast Sent Drag to reorder priority
Proof of Work mines a hash prefix on your events, acting as a spam deterrent. Higher difficulty takes longer but signals more effort. Notes Enable PoW for notes Mine proof of work before publishing notes Note difficulty Reactions Enable PoW for reactions Mine proof of work on reactions (sub-second at low difficulty) Reaction difficulty Direct Messages Enable PoW for DMs Mine proof of work on gift wraps before sending DMs DM difficulty %d bits
Social graph has not been computed yet.
No errors logged
Option %d + Add option Single choice Multiple choice Compute Now Fetching follow lists... Building graph... Computing network... Filtering... Fetching relay lists... This may take 2\u20135 minutes. Please stay on this screen until it finishes. Top Accounts %1$d qualified from %2$d follows Recompute View Profile followed by %d Followed by %d of your follows Computation complete Done Discovery failed Retry Follows 2nd degree Qualified Relays Follows (1st degree) 2nd degree users Qualified (threshold) Relays covered
Preview Check relay backups Copy address Copy invoice Invoice QR Code Lightning Address QR Code Refresh balance Transaction History Spark Breez Add Members Already added Close Collapse Expand
Welcome back Let\'s get you set up Your network, your relays Zap Cooking discovers which relays your friends actually use, then connects directly to those relays. This means faster delivery and fewer missed posts — no central server needed. Quick follow Long-press any profile picture to follow or unfollow Zap Cooking Try it — long-press the picture above Zap Cooking supports zaps with an embedded Lightning wallet or Nostr Wallet Connect. You can set this up anytime from the Wallet screen. Setting things up You\'re all set! Mapping your social graph… Finding your friends\' relays… Connecting to your network… Locating gm notes… Cheering up fiatjaf… Have fun playing with your bitcoins… This is a one time setup, lower your time preference… Almost there… Please wait… Publishing… Creating account… Zap Cooking logo Follow All (%d)
Send Zap sats Quick Amounts Wallet Not Connected Connect a Lightning wallet to send zaps. Both parties need DM relays Private — replying to a private thread Private zap requires DM relays on both sides Zap %d sats Zap Failed Pay Now Expired Any amount Pay Invoice Pay Paid Payment Failed Connect a Lightning wallet to send and receive sats. Paste a NWC connection string from your wallet provider. Recommended wallets Connecting… Set up your Lightning Address Get a username@breez.tips address Tap to reveal Decrypting messages… Mining… Peer You inbox your relays
Text Size Large text Increase text size across the app Language Themes Choose a color scheme Accent Color Preview New Notes Button Hide new notes button Hide the floating button that appears when new notes arrive %d new notes Hide until app restart Hide forever Mining PoW (%dk)… Cancel mining Broadcasting (%d/%d) Published to %d relay Published to %d relays Media Auto-load media Automatically download images and videos in notes. When off, tap to load. Video autoplay Automatically play videos when they scroll into view Multi-image layout Gallery: horizontal swipe through every photo and video. Stack: each item full-width below the next. Gallery Stack Hide live streams Hide the live streams row from the top of your feed Client Tag Tag notes with Zap Cooking Include a tag identifying Zap Cooking as the client. This is visible to others. Posting Undo countdown Holds new posts for a few seconds before publishing so you can cancel. Duration Include replies Off by default — replies send immediately. Turn on to apply the same countdown to replies. Public Key Share this freely — it\'s your Nostr identifier. Private Key Public key copied Private key copied Authenticate to view your private key Authentication failed: %s Hide private key
Save your backup key Your account lives on your key. Save it now so you can always get back in. Private key (nsec) Public key (npub) This is your public identity — safe to share. Download backup file Backup file saved Couldn\'t save the backup file This key is the only way to recover your account. There is no password reset. Anyone who has it controls your account — never share it. I\'ve saved it Skip for now Back up your key so you never lose your account Back up Dismiss Never share your private key. Anyone with your nsec has full control of your account. Notes containing these words will be hidden from your feed. No muted users
Filters Spam replies Uses an on-device model to hide likely-bot replies in threads and notifications from people you don\'t follow. Model runs locally, no data leaves your device. Web of Trust Only show content from accounts within your social graph. Requires a computed social graph. Social graph ready (%d qualified accounts) Last computed %s ago Social graph not computed Social graph is stale Compute now Recompute Filter is inactive until graph is computed No replies yet %d hidden replies from likely spam accounts Show Hide Not spam
Copy Profile JSON Profile JSON copied
Translation Auto-translate notes Automatically translate notes that aren\'t in your device language. Sensitive content Tap to reveal Show more Show less Show Original Show Translation Same Language Translate Detecting language… Downloading language model… Translating… Translated from %s
Social graph required The extended feed shows posts from friends-of-friends. You need to compute your social graph first. Couldn\'t connect to relay Delete %s and all its hashtags? Relay list broadcast Failed to broadcast No results found No recipe packs found You have not published any packs No saved packs yet Sign in to view this tab Recipe not found Recipe pack not found Couldn\'t load %d recipes
%d recipe
%d recipes
Sign in to view your cookbook Start Your Cookbook Save recipes you love and organize them into collections. No published recipes yet Manage collection Rename Edit description Choose cover Delete Collection name Description Delete collection? Delete \"%1$s\"? This removes the collection but won\'t delete the recipes themselves. Add recipes to this collection to choose a cover. Save to collection New list Collection name No collections yet Search recipes, people, and notes No notifications yet No messages yet Send a message from someone\'s profile Searching for your profile… Finding your friends… Finding your friends… %d/%d Discovering extended network… %d/%d Connecting to %d extended relays… Subscribing to feed… Loading notes… Connecting to relays… Finding posts… Preparing your feed… List not found This list has no members Nourish Get Nourish profile Scoring… (this can take a moment) See this recipe\'s Nourish profile across 8 dimensions. Nourish scoring is a Zap Cooking members feature. Sign in with a key to fetch Nourish profiles. Open in Nourish hub See the Nourish profile of a recipe Nourish gives a gentle, non-judgmental snapshot of a recipe using our green-island profile card. Scanner inputs and ranked Nourish discovery are coming in a later update. Pick a recipe Open a recipe from the Recipes tab, then return here to see its Nourish profile. Browse recipes Loading recipe… Using your selected recipe to fetch or compute its Nourish profile. Open recipe details Explore analyzed recipes For now, browse the Recipes feed while we prepare a dedicated Nourish explore surface. Go to Recipes
Add to Relay Set Select Relay Select List Delete Set Add search relay
Broadcast Relay List (NIP-65) Broadcast DM Relays Broadcast Search Relays Broadcast Blocked Relays
reposted and %d others reposted PoW %d Replying to %s Post now (%ds)
npub Hex
Hide until app restart Hide forever
24h
Notes Replies Conversation Gallery Media Following Followers Chat Rooms Relays Recent Likes Reposts Zaps Replies Edit Profile Follows you Copy Profile JSON Add to List Block Unblock No notes yet No replies yet No shared threads yet No gallery posts yet No media yet Not following anyone No followers found No chat rooms No relay list published Relay List (NIP-65) Discovered Relays Other Discovered Relays Pinned Profile JSON copied Send message Search notes Still crawling or account too new No ranked results yet. Check back later.
Drafts & Scheduled Drafts Scheduled No drafts saved No scheduled posts Draft Reply Delete draft (empty) Remove from schedule
Diagnostics Diagnostic mode Log event processing decisions to a file for debugging Share logs Share diagnostic logs Clear logs
Post cannot be empty Not logged in Pick a date and time to schedule Scheduled time must be in the future Failed to publish: %s Poll needs at least 2 options Could not connect to scheduler relay No relays connected — note was not published
Make sure you\'ve backed up your private key before logging out. You can find it in Keys settings. Without it, you won\'t be able to recover your account.
Zap Cooking is better with zaps! Send and receive Lightning payments, and zap anyone on Nostr. #Nostrichefs Connect a Lightning wallet to send value directly to creators and help %1$s keep publishing great recipes, tips, and stories. Breez Spark (Self-Custodial) Self-custody, embedded. Use your default wallet or restore from seed/relays. Built-in wallet – simplest for new users NWC (Nostr Wallet Connect) Connect any NWC-compatible wallet Paste the connection string from your NWC-compatible wallet. Connection string starts with nostr+walletconnect:// Checking for saved wallet… Wallet backup found A wallet connection you saved on Zap Cooking was found on your relays. Restore Self-custodial Lightning, powered by Spark and Breez. Create new wallet Generate a fresh 12-word seed phrase Restore from seed phrase 12 words from a Spark-based wallet Restore from relays Encrypted backup from another device Close NWC Connection String Connect Set up your Lightning Address Send Receive Lightning address or invoice Paste Scan QR Gallery Next Scan QR Code Camera permission required Grant Permission Point your camera at a Lightning invoice or address QR code Send to Resolving… Confirm Payment sats Fees Total spent Pay Sending payment… Payment Received Transactions No transactions yet Load more Received Sent fee: %,d sats SDK v%s Not supported by your wallet Creating invoice… Wallet backup not found Your wallet recovery phrase is not backed up to any relay. If you lose this device, you could lose your funds. Backup Now Back up your recovery phrase You haven\'t viewed your recovery phrase yet. Write it down to protect your funds. View Recovery Phrase Powered by Secured by your Nostr key Restores on any device when you sign in. Tap to also save your seed phrase as a backup. Recent View all
Direct Messages Chat Rooms Join Chat Room Create Chat Room Invalid invite link Couldn\'t join chat room The relay rejected your join request. This room may be invite-only — ask an admin for an invite link with a code. Relay URL Room ID Room Name Join Cancel Create Join existing chat room Create new chat room Discover chat rooms Discover Chat Rooms No chat rooms yet Tap + to join or create a chat room Join chat room New group DM Chat room actions Chat Room Info Edit chat room Invite Link Copy link Members (%d) Member list not available Remove User Remove %s from this group? Remove Edit Chat Room About Save Remove user Picture URL Upload group picture Leave Chat Room Leave Chat Room Leave this chat room? You can rejoin later using the invite link. Delete Chat Room Delete Chat Room Permanently delete this chat room? This cannot be undone. Delete note? Send a deletion request to relays for this note? This cannot be guaranteed. Notifications On — new messages will be tracked Off — tap to enable
Private Only members can read messages Closed Only invited users can join Restricted Only members can post Hidden Group info is hidden from non-members Public Anyone can read messages Open Anyone can join Unrestricted Anyone can post Visible Group info can be found by anyone
Access & visibility Invite codes Generate invite code Latest invite code Copy code Copy invite link Assign role Roles (comma-separated) Set roles for %s. Leave empty to revoke admin status. Assign role
Fiat Mode Fiat Mode Show zap and wallet amounts in a fiat currency instead of satoshis. Rates are fetched once when the app starts — this is an approximation, not real‑time pricing. Enable Fiat Mode Display amounts in your chosen currency across the app. Currency Rates updated %1$s Rates not yet fetched Refresh 1 BTC ≈ %1$s %2$,.2f
Send Money Send %1$s
%1$s sats fee: %1$s This recovery phrase is specific to Spark wallets. It will not work with other wallet apps. Generate invoice Use my default wallet Derived from your Nostr key — no extra backup needed. Switch Wallet Disconnect this wallet so you can use your default wallet or restore a different one. Your funds stay safe — you can reconnect this wallet anytime by entering its recovery phrase. This wallet is derived from your Nostr key, so the phrase below is just for export to other wallet apps. You don\'t need to back it up — your nsec is the backup.
